title: leucanthemum pachyphyllum
intro: Leucanthemum pachyphyllum, also known as the Ox-eye Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum pachyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Leucanthemum pachyllum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory discomfort.
